name: Automated Artifact Collector
description: Collects pipeline definitions and generates a manifest.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used export_as without roles.

params.cmd: ls active/shared/tmp/artifacts/*.json | xargs -n 1 basename | jq -R . | jq -s '{"artifacts": .}'

params.message: ✅ Artifacts collected and MANIFEST.json generated in active/shared/tmp/artifacts/
